summary_en: Quantum Solutions to acquire remaining 50% stake (500 shares) in Compass Cloud AI Japan from Compass Cloud Technology Pte. Ltd. for ¥100. Target company established July 2023 as 50-50 JV; no operational revenue since inception. Consolidation aimed at centralizing AI infrastructure business assets (GPU equipment, data centre contracts, external partnerships) under parent management.
title_en: Notice regarding full subsidiary conversion of affiliate company subject to equity method accounting
translation_en_brief: Quantum Solutions announced on 22 May 2026 that its board has resolved to acquire the remaining 500 shares (50% stake) of Compass Cloud AI Japan Co., Ltd. from Compass Cloud Technology Pte. Ltd. for ¥100. The target company was established in July 2023 as a joint venture between the two parties to develop AI and cloud-related business in Japan. Since inception, no material operational revenue has been generated, and the partnership has not progressed to concrete project formation in the Japanese market. Compass Cloud's strategic focus shifted toward Singapore and US markets, making continued joint operation in Japan infeasible. The target's net assets have deteriorated due to ongoing administrative costs. Quantum Solutions determined that full ownership and centralized management of the company's assets (GPU equipment, data centre contracts, funding arrangements, and external partnerships) is rational for advancing its group's AI infrastructure business platform.
